topic: Teacher Assignment to Classes and Subjects
summary: This topic explains how to assign various roles to employees for a class, including Class Teacher, Coordinator, and Subject Teacher. It covers the rules for single vs. multiple assignments for each role.
navigation: Subject Class Mapping (after creating mapping for a class)
steps: After creating 'Subject Class Mapping' for a class (e.g., Class 5th, Section A).
To assign a 'Class Teacher', select an employee from the list.
To assign 'Coordinators', select one or more employees from the list.
To assign 'Subject Teachers' for specific subjects, select the subject and then choose one or more employees from the list.
business_rules: Only a single employee can be assigned as the 'Class Teacher' for a specific class.
Multiple employees can be assigned as 'Coordinators' for a class.
Multiple employees can be assigned as 'Subject Teachers' for a single subject.
Class Teachers and Coordinators are granted access to all subjects within their assigned class.
important_notes: Teacher assignments are based on employee IDs created in the system.
questions: How do I assign a class teacher to a class?
Can a class have more than one coordinator?
How do I assign a subject teacher to a specific subject?
What kind of access do class teachers and coordinators have to subjects?
Can multiple teachers be assigned to the same subject?
